title: Flagship Store Manager - Large Format Retail
description:
• Lead a true flagship with scale and impact.
  • Be part of a well-established, people-first retail brand.

About Our Client

Our client is a well-established international retail brand known for its strong market presence, high-quality products, and commitment to developing retail leaders. With a collaborative culture and structured leadership support, they offer a stable platform for people to grow their careers while making a real commercial impact.

Job Description

  • Lead and manage a large-format flagship store at Plaza Singapura with a team of 50+ staff.
  • Drive sales, profitability, and performance against budget, KPIs, and P&L targets.
  • Build and sustain a high-performance, customer-centric culture through strong leadership and engagement.
  • Oversee all store operations including stock control, shrinkage, cash handling, rostering, and compliance.
  • Ensure excellent in-store standards across visual merchandising, presentation, and customer experience.
  • Coach, develop, and retain a strong leadership pipeline, including Assistant Managers and Department Leads.
  • Analyse sales and operational data to identify opportunities and implement action plans to improve performance.
  • Partner closely with the Regional Manager and Head Office to execute commercial and operational strategies.
  • Lead by example on the shop floor, setting expectations for service, productivity, and accountability.



The Successful Applicant

A successful Store Manager should have:

  • Proven experience as a Store Manager or Senior Store Manager in a large-format, high-volume retail environment.
  • Demonstrated track record of leading and developing large teams in fast-paced settings.
  • Strong commercial acumen with hands-on P&L management and KPI delivery.
  • Excellent people leadership skills with the ability to build engagement, performance, and succession.
  • Operationally strong, with experience across stock control, shrinkage, rostering, and compliance.
  • Customer-focused, with high standards for service and store presentation.
  • Comfortable working weekends and retail trading hours.

What's on Offer

  • Leadership development and structured training programmes to support long-term career growth.
  • Direct support and coaching from an experienced Regional Manager.
  • Staff discounts and comprehensive employee benefits.
  • A collaborative, people-focused culture within a well-established international retail brand.
